criteria.name: Full test suite passes
criteria.evidence: 11 test failures across 4 files persist unchanged from prior review. (1) tests/test_validation.py: 7 failures in TestCompareStationData + 1 in TestValidateAgainstReference — tests call compare_station_data(station_name_str, df, df) but function signature is compare_station_data(ref_df, cmp_df, on=, value_cols=), causing 'str' has no attribute 'merge' at validation.py:39. The TESTS have the wrong call signature, not the function. (2) tests/test_repo_shape.py: 1 failure — requirements.lock exists in repo root but not in ALLOWED_ROOT_FILES set at line 48. (3) tests/test_pipeline_execution.py: 3 failures — daily CSV artifacts missing 'rows' field in manifest, imputation_report not tracked as typed artifact. (4) tests/test_data_refresh.py: 2 new failures introduced by Ralph's fix (9251ada) — ImportError: cannot import 'load_station_files' from normalized_loader, and ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'src'.

failing_nodes.message: Tests call compare_station_data(str, df, df) but function expects (df, df, on, value_cols)
Daily CSV manifest entries missing rows field
imputation_report not tracked as typed artifact in manifest
ImportError: load_station_files not in normalized_loader (broken by 9251ada)
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named src (broken by 9251ada)

summary: Phase 7 E2E validation: REJECT. AC-E2E-7 now PASS (Ralph's pseudo-station fix works). AC-E2E-8 still FAIL with 11 test failures across 4 files. The 3 previously identified failing nodes (validation.py test signature mismatch, requirements.lock whitelist, manifest missing rows/imputation_report type) remain UNFIXED. Ralph introduced 2 NEW test failures in test_data_refresh.py via broken imports in commit 9251ada. Total: 5 distinct failing nodes (7 root causes). Next Ralph run should: (1) fix test_validation.py call signatures, (2) add requirements.lock to ALLOWED_ROOT_FILES, (3) add 'rows' field to daily CSV manifest entries and imputation_report type, (4) revert broken import changes in test_data_refresh.py.
